evals.prompt: Add a new iSCSI target 10.0.1.50 on host esxi-01 and verify the new LUNs appear
evals.expected_output: iSCSI target added, storage rescanned, new datastores visible
expectations: Uses storage_iscsi_enable if adapter not enabled
Uses storage_rescan or verifies with list_all_datastores

evals.prompt: Check vSAN health on cluster Production and show me the capacity breakdown
evals.expected_output: vSAN health status and capacity details

evals.prompt: Find all OVA files on datastore1 that I can use for deployment
expectations: Uses scan_datastore_images or browse_datastore with OVA filter
Returns file paths suitable for deploy_vm_from_ova
